## Security impact

- [ ] No secrets added to source, fixtures, logs, or screenshots
- [ ] Renderer remains unprivileged
- [ ] No router write added, or required write-safety gates are documented
- [ ] Router data is treated as untrusted input

## Router compatibility evidence

State model, hardware revision, firmware/build, user role, and whether behavior is observed or inferred.
